user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Understood. To make the cover letter more impactful, I will integrate a specific reference to the company's open-source work.

Please provide the name of the company and the specific open-source project or contribution you would like me to highlight. Once you provide those details, I will revise the cover letter to connect your technical experience directly to their public repository activity, ensuring the tone remains professional and targeted.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as within its scope and offered to perform the task once the necessary specific details were provided.
